refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual operational uptime over the evaluation period and compare against the target availability metric.
sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and failover mechanisms
Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance
Automated fault detection and recovery procedures
selected_dp.selected_dp: Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance

potential_sources: Dependency on telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Interaction with Safety Services for fault alerts
coupling_check.notes: DP logically centralizes availability management by leveraging health monitoring and predictive maintenance, minimizing cross-module coupling.

assumptions_risks: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating fault recovery procedures explicitly in next refinement level.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized management of availability through health monitoring and maintenance coordination

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time operational data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts to Safety Services upon detection of critical faults

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and other modules for data exchange and control

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as availability logic is centralized here; low diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Limited containment; mainly data source for telemetry.
Limited containment; provides telemetry and tasking data.
Receives alerts but does not contain availability logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability management in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from other modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution and consider modularizing availability sub-functions if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically addresses the refined FR by focusing on health monitoring and predictive maintenance to meet availability targets.

dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment is strong within NGHE Solution; interfaces are clearly defined minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified by measuring uptime and fault recovery times through telemetry data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of availability management to NGHE Solution module is clear and aligns with system architecture.

recommended_revisions: Refine fault recovery procedures in next decomposition level.
Validate telemetry data accuracy and latency assumptions.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the availability requirement with a clear DP and IM assignment that passes all gates.
next_level_sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

revise.why: No immediate revisions needed; next steps involve decomposing sub-FRs.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
